title: Hungry Waters
description: The piranhas have arrived, and they are hungry.
body:
# Hungry Waters

Beware the waters... Piranhas have arrived!

![Piranhas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e70b3792f4dfd1c87e7995a9c6c90f70d240de6_0.webp)

## Overview
This mod introduces a new fish entity: the piranha.
A school of piranhas will spawn randomly in either swamp biomes, or river biomes. Piranhas have a hunger bar which goes down over time, then they enter hunting mode and will attack anything near them to refill their hunger bar.

## Features
- Piranha custom entity
- Piranha have a hunger bar, when it reaches zero, they will enter into hunting mode and start hunting anything alive nearby (including you)
- Piranhas will fight back when attacked
- Piranhas will only spawn in river or swamp water biomes.

## Configuration
The mod includes a config file allowing you to tweak many things!

## Datapack
Spawn frequency and school size can be customized via datapack, as these values are loaded from a biome modifier file.

## Compatibility
Has native support for [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) as well as [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), and most likely any other biome mod (using common tags).

## Credits
Huge thanks to @HotWizard for all of the artwork — model, textures, and animations.


## Modpacks
You can use the mod in your modpacks as long as I get credit for the mod.


## Bug report
Encountered a compatibility issue or something feels off? Report it on [Github](https://github.com/acorsicanfrog/hungrywaters) and I'll get to it as soon as I can.
